output_text:
type CustomerId inherits String
type AddressId inherits String
type ProductId inherits String
type LineItemId inherits String
type OrderId inherits String
type ShipmentId inherits String

model Customer {
    customerId: CustomerId
    name: String
    email: String
}

model Address {
    addressId: AddressId
    street: String
    city: String
    state: String
    zipCode: String
    country: String
}

model Product {
    productId: ProductId
    name: String
    price: Decimal
}

model LineItem {
    lineItemId: LineItemId
    orderId: OrderId?
    productId: ProductId
    quantity: Int
}

model Order {
    orderId: OrderId
    customerId: CustomerId
    orderDate: Instant
    items: LineItem[]
}

model Shipment {
    shipmentId: ShipmentId
    orderId: OrderId
    destinationAddressId: AddressId
    shipDate: Instant?
    status: String
}

service OrderService {
    operation createOrder(order: Order): Order
    operation getOrder(orderId: OrderId): Order
    operation shipOrder(shipment: Shipment): Shipment
}

namespace blogging

type AuthorId inherits String
type ArticleId inherits String
type CommentId inherits String
type LikeId inherits String

enum ArticleStatus {
    DRAFT,
    PUBLISHED,
    ARCHIVED
}

model Author {
    authorId: AuthorId
    name: String
}

model Article {
    articleId: ArticleId
    title: String
    content: String
    status: ArticleStatus
    author: Author
    createdAt: Instant
    updatedAt: Instant?
}

model Comment {
    commentId: CommentId
    article: Article
    author: Author
    text: String
    createdAt: Instant
}

model Like {
    likeId: LikeId
    article: Article
    author: Author
    createdAt: Instant
}

service BlogService {
    operation createDraft(author: Author, title: String, content: String): Article
    operation publishArticle(articleId: ArticleId): Article
    operation addComment(articleId: ArticleId, author: Author, text: String): Comment
    operation listComments(articleId: ArticleId): Comment[]
    operation likeArticle(articleId: ArticleId, author: Author): Like
}

namespace parcel.shipping

type Weight inherits Decimal
type Length inherits Decimal
type Width inherits Decimal
type Height inherits Decimal

enum ShipmentStatus {
    PENDING,
    IN_TRANSIT,
    DELIVERED,
    FAILED,
    RETURNED
}

model Address {
    street: String,
    city: String,
    state: String,
    zipCode: String,
    country: String
}

model Parcel {
    parcelId: String,
    weight: Weight,
    length: Length,
    width: Width,
    height: Height,
    status: ShipmentStatus
}

model Route {
    origin: Address,
    destination: Address,
    waypoints: Address[]
}

service ShippingService {
    operation bookShipment(parcel: Parcel): Parcel
    operation updateStatus(parcelId: String, newStatus: ShipmentStatus): Parcel
    operation getRoute(parcelId: String): Route?
}

namespace prescription

type DrugId inherits String
type PatientId inherits String
type PharmacyId inherits String

model Drug {
    drugId: DrugId
    name: String
    description: String?
}

model Prescription {
    prescriptionId: String
    patientId: PatientId
    drugId: DrugId
    dosage: String
    duration: Int
    datePrescribed: Instant
}

model Pharmacy {
    pharmacyId: PharmacyId
    name: String
    address: String
}

service PrescriptionService {
    operation createPrescription(patientId: PatientId, drugId: DrugId, dosage: String, duration: Int): Prescription
    operation fillPrescription(prescriptionId: String, pharmacyId: PharmacyId): Boolean
    operation listPrescriptionsForPatient(patientId: PatientId): Prescription[]
}

namespace driver.payouts

type DriverId inherits String
type PeriodStart inherits Instant
type PeriodEnd inherits Instant
type GrossAmount inherits Decimal
type NetAmount inherits Decimal

    periodStart: PeriodStart
    periodEnd: PeriodEnd
    grossAmount: GrossAmount
    netAmount: NetAmount
}

service PayoutService {
    operation computePayout(driverId: DriverId, periodStart: PeriodStart, periodEnd: PeriodEnd): Payout
    operation listPastPayouts(driverId: DriverId): Payout[]
}
